items.title: Inflation Pressures Were Tamed A Few Years Ago
items.description: The PCE deflator is a better measure than the CPI because the weightings of its components are dynamically adjusted to account for changes in consumer behavior.

items.title: 'No More Mr. Nice Guy' Meets 'Still No Mr. Progress'
items.description: Stocks centimetered higher Monday, undeterred by feeble factory data, a fresh outbreak of metals-based mischief, and the usual pantomime between Washington and Beijing.

items.title: SEC Concerned About Crypto ETFs With Staking Exposure
items.description: - The SEC is concerned about crypto ETFs that offer exposure to staking. - Staking allows crypto investors to earn rewards on the tokens they hold.

items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq close higher as US-China trade tensions flare up
items.description: China added fuel to simmering trade tensions with the US, setting investors on guard as they turned the page on a bullish May.

items.title: President Trump Posts On Truth Social "The AUTOPEN should have stopped Iran a long time ago from "enriching." Under our potential Agreement — WE WILL NOT ALLOW ANY ENRICHMENT OF URANIUM!"
